productDisplayName: Just Natural Unisex Charcoal Rain Jacket
description: Style noteLightweight and compact when not in use this waterproof jacket from just natural is ideal for rainy days. Elastication at the hood, sleeve and bottom hem block water completely. It has multiple pockets inside and out, to help keep your monetary essentials dry.Product DetailsCharcoal and black rainwear jacket, detachable zipper and Velcro closure in front, two welt pockets with zippered closures in front,  black panels near front side seams, black yoke with red panel extending to the sleeve, full sleeve with panels and print on right sleeve, elasticated sleeve hem with Velcro to adjust Fit, paneled hood with clasp for rolling it away when not needed, adjustable and elasticated bottom and hood hem, mesh lining at chest with branded taping Material and carePolyesterMachine wash coldDo not iron Size and FitThe model (height 5'8"and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
